message:
test(connectors): add comprehensive unit tests for all 20 connector type modules

Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to every connector's types.rs, covering:

- Serde roundtrip (serialize → deserialize → equality check)
- Default trait implementations
- Display/Debug formatting
- Builder pattern method chaining
- Enum variant coverage and as_str() methods
- Edge cases: empty strings, boundary values, optional fields

Connectors covered: airtable, anthropic (Model pricing, Role, StopReason,
ContentBlock, MessageRequest/Response), browser, discord (Embed, Component,
Permission bitflags), figma (Node types, Style, Effect), github (Event,
PullRequest, CheckRun), google-ai (GenerationConfig, SafetySetting),
google-calendar (Event, FreeBusy), jira (Issue, Transition), linear
(Issue, Project, Team), notion (Block, Page, Database), pinecone (Vector,
SparseValues), qdrant (Point, Filter, Payload), s3 (Object, Bucket),
slack (Message, Block, Attachment), stripe (Customer, PaymentIntent,
Subscription), telegram (Update, Message, Chat types), twilio (Message,
Call, Recording), twitter (Tweet, User, Media, Poll), zendesk (Ticket,
User, Comment)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
